description_long: This is a standard-sized green aluminum beer can with a metallic pull tab on top. The can features a circular label design with concentric rings and a central crest, surrounded by bold, white, and gold typography. The main label is accented with red script and a small emblem above the text, giving it a classic European beer aesthetic. The top of the can is silver, with a clearly defined pull tab for opening. The sides of the can are smooth and cylindrical, with the label wrapping seamlessly around the body. The overall appearance is clean, glossy, and typical of commercial beer cans found in urban environments.
description: A green aluminum beer can with a metallic pull tab, circular label, and classic European-style graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full label with crest, bold white and gold text, and red script.
description_view_1: Side view with partial label text visible, mostly green surface and the silver pull tab on top.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the main label and crest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with partial label text, mostly green surface, and visible pull tab.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features concentric green and gold rings, a central crest emblem, and bold white and gold typography with a red script accent. The design is classic and clean, with a traditional European beer aesthetic.
